title: Amtech J0103 4m 2000kg tow rope
features: DURABLE: This tow rope is made from extremely strong polypropylene with tough, forged steel hooks
CARRY BAG: The tow strap comes with a handy storage bag and red warning flag
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 4m TOW ROPE (GS) See more
